title: Apply TerraYield sales parcel plan with visible five slot progress
note: Continue applying the TerraYield plan with visible progress. Use five independent active slots and write panel-visible evidence files. Focus the work on sales data evidence, parcel matching, backend checks, frontend map layer checks, data-cache hashes, and validation. Each slot must write ai-results slot files. Do not let one slot block the other slots. Wait 10-15 minutes before writing devam et.
